description: First-order logic syntax and semantics, Completeness and Compactness Theorems, Lowenheim-Skolem Theorem, computable and computably enumerable sets, Incompleteness Theorem, axioms of Zermelo-Fraenkel set theory with choice, ordinal and cardinal arithmetic.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Graduate/professional standing or member of the Pre-Masters Mathematics (Visiting International) Program
